description: Add comprehensive integration tests for all new endpoints: projects, registers, snapshots, shares, and security features (MFA encryption, password change session revocation, session cleanup).
steps: Create server/test/projects.test.ts following the pattern of cases.test.ts: CRUD lifecycle (create, list, get, update, soft-delete) + tenant isolation tests (user B cannot see/modify/delete user A's projects). Use buildTestApp, registerUser, cleanDatabase from helpers.ts.

Create server/test/registers.test.ts: create register row with type+projectId+data, list by type+projectId, update, soft-delete, tenant isolation. Test with at least 2 different register types (e.g. hazop, calibration).

Create server/test/snapshots.test.ts: take snapshot (POST with projectId), list snapshots, rename (PATCH), delete, restore (POST /snapshots/:id/restore verifies project state is restored). Tenant isolation.

Create server/test/shares.test.ts: create share token (POST /shares), list active tokens, revoke (DELETE), validate via public endpoint (GET /shared/:token returns project data), test expired token is rejected, test revoked token is rejected. Tenant isolation (user B cannot list/revoke user A's share tokens).

Create server/test/security.test.ts: (a) After MFA enroll, verify the mfaSecret stored in DB is encrypted (not the raw base32 secret), (b) POST /auth/change-password with valid current+new password succeeds and old sessions are revoked, (c) cleanExpiredSessions removes expired/revoked sessions from DB.
Run all tests and confirm they pass
acceptance_criteria: All new test files exist and pass
test/projects.test.ts has at least 8 tests (CRUD + tenant isolation)
test/shares.test.ts has at least 6 tests (including public endpoint + expired/revoked rejection)
All existing tests (auth + cases) continue to pass
npm test passes with all tests green
verification: Run `cd server && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://qi:qi@localhost:5432/qi_platform?schema=public npm test` and confirm all tests pass (old + new)
